samples.helper_text: Candidate's passport-size photograph with clear face and plain background.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a clear passport-size photograph. Face should be visible, not cropped, and background should be simple.

samples.helper_text: Clear front-side image or PDF of the candidate's PAN card.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable PAN card copy where name, PAN number, and date of birth are clearly visible.

samples.helper_text: Clear Aadhaar card copy of the candidate. Front and back if available.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable Aadhaar copy. Masking can be accepted if current business rules allow it.

samples.helper_text: Passport first and last page showing identity and address details.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload clear passport pages showing candidate identity, passport number, validity, and address details.

samples.helper_text: Class 10 marksheet showing student name, board, year, and marks clearly.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable 10th marksheet with student name, passing year, board, and marks visible.

samples.helper_text: Class 12 marksheet showing student name, board, year, and marks clearly.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable 12th marksheet with student name, passing year, board, and marks visible.

samples.helper_text: Latest or consolidated graduation marksheet.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the latest semester or consolidated graduation marksheet showing student name, university, course, and marks/CGPA.

samples.helper_text: Final graduation degree certificate issued by the university.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the final degree certificate if issued by the university.

samples.helper_text: Post-graduation marksheet, if applicable.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload post-graduation marksheet only if applicable to the candidate's academic profile.

samples.helper_text: Post-graduation degree certificate, if applicable.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload post-graduation degree certificate only if applicable.

samples.helper_text: Official offer/admission letter from the university or institution.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the official admission or offer letter showing university name, course, intake, and student name.

samples.helper_text: I-20 form issued by the US institution confirming admission and SEVIS details.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the I-20 form issued by your US institution showing student name, SEVIS ID, programme, and start date.

samples.helper_text: CAS (Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies) letter issued by the UK institution.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the CAS letter or statement from your UK institution showing CAS number, student name, course, and start date.

samples.helper_text: CoE (Confirmation of Enrolment) issued by the Australian institution.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload the CoE issued by your Australian institution showing CoE number, student name, course, and dates.

samples.helper_text: English language test scorecard, if available or required.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload official IELTS, TOEFL, PTE, or equivalent English proficiency scorecard if available or required.

samples.helper_text: GRE official scorecard, if available or required.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload official GRE scorecard if available or required for the course/lender.

samples.helper_text: Co-applicant's passport-size photograph with clear face and plain background.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a clear passport-size photograph of the co-applicant.

samples.helper_text: Clear front-side image or PDF of the co-applicant's PAN card.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable PAN card copy where co-applicant name, PAN number, and date of birth are clearly visible.

samples.helper_text: Clear Aadhaar card copy of the co-applicant. Front and back if available.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload a readable Aadhaar copy of the co-applicant.

samples.helper_text: Latest salary slips, preferably last 3 months.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload recent salary slips showing employer name, employee name, salary breakup, and month.

samples.helper_text: Latest ITR documents, preferably last 2 years if available.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload recent ITR documents or acknowledgement as per existing business process.

samples.helper_text: Recent bank statement, preferably last 6 months.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload bank statement showing account holder name, bank name, transactions, and statement period.

samples.helper_text: Property ownership documents if secured/collateral loan route applies.
samples.sample_instruction: Upload registry, title deed, ownership proof, or related collateral documents only if collateral/secured loan route applies.

watermark: SAMPLE ONLY — NOT A REAL DOCUMENT
usage: View Sample modal in EduLoans document upload UI
notes: All assets are dummy / placeholder only.
Generic 'Sample Govt Icon' and 'Sample ID Authority' placeholders are used in place of real emblems / logos.
No real document numbers, scannable QR codes, official seals, or real personal data are present.
